page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCI645 or TLPL615.

Formerly: EDCI645.

TLPL616 Teaching and Learning Statistics in the Middle School (3 Credits)

Designed to enhance both the pedagogical and statistical/data analysis content knowledge of middle school mathematics teachers. Prerequisite: Admission to M.Ed. or M.A. program in EDCI with concentration in Mathematical Education.
